title: Page context contract and server resolver
goal: Add a safe PageContextEnvelope contract, server-side current-window snapshot storage, and selected-object resolver.
requirements: Define schema_version, window_id, context_version, page, selection, filters, ui_state and capabilities fields.
Reject or sanitize unknown/oversized context payloads.
Persist sanitized immutable current-window snapshots per user/window_id/context_version with TTL.
Add AIWindowContextSnapshot model or equivalent versioned storage with indexes for user/window_id/context_version and expires_at.
Increment context_version on accepted context updates.
Recompute capabilities server-side and treat client-provided capabilities only as UI hints.
Bind context_snapshot_id to ChatMessage at submit time.
Store only context_snapshot_id, window_id, context_version, context_hash, safe summary/digest in ChatMessage metadata.
Add cleanup command/job for expired snapshots.
Do not trust client-provided display text as factual content.
acceptance: Invalid context does not break chat submission.
Foreign workorder selection is not resolved.
Resolved workorder context contains safe identifiers and allowed capability flags.
Submitting a chat message binds an immutable context_snapshot_id.
ui.get_current_context can read the bound snapshot after the browser has moved to another card.
Expired snapshots are cleaned up by command/job.
